composition_vocabulary: Predominantly centred product shots with clean or bold-colour backgrounds; a handful of editorial fragments (cropped body, lifestyle context) interrupt the still-life rhythm. Graphic and sketch tiles function as mood punctuation rather than product documentation, giving the grid an art-school layout-board feel.
lighting_quality: Mostly flat studio lighting with high-key or saturated backgrounds; a few tiles use harder contrast, but chiaroscuro is absent — the mood is graphic rather than atmospheric.
material_textures: polished leather, chrome/liquid metal, croc-embossed leather, matte canvas, gold cast metal, patent/lacquer
aesthetic_register: The sample sits at the intersection of contemporary luxury accessories and esoteric-graphic energy — closer to post-streetwear luxury (Jacquemus, Diesel, Blumarine) than traditional heirloom, but stitched together by a consistent Egyptian-occult symbolic thread.
notably_absent: Fine jewellery — rings, necklaces, earrings — is almost entirely absent as a primary subject, and there is no organic material (stone, flora, parchment, aged patina) that one would expect on a heirloom or talisman-focused moodboard.
